title: kubeadm Configuration (v1beta4) — DNS
text:
Appears in:
ClusterConfiguration
DNS defines the DNS addon that should be used in the cluster
Field
Description
ImageMeta
[Required]
ImageMeta
(Members of
ImageMeta
are embedded into this type.)
imageMeta
allows to customize the image used for the DNS addon.
disabled
[Required]
bool
disabled
specifies whether to disable this addon in the cluster.

allows to customize the image used for the DNS addon.
